utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Next, verify if each is fully specified with required details: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides two subitems (physical_health and mental_health) each with provider, plan, cost, and details. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides home_contents with provider, plan, cost, and details. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides an annual_plan with provider, plan, cost, and details. Fully specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan states cost €0/month and details about elimination of a previous service. Fully specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes monthly_cost and annual_cost and an extra comparison. Fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final plan and match to exact names in the ground-truth. Mental health: LifeFirst Standard Plan maps to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 8.
